com.hp.workpath.api.job

Class JobService.AbstractJobletObserver

  • java.lang.Object
    • android.content.BroadcastReceiver
      • com.hp.workpath.api.job.JobService.AbstractJobletObserver
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ILetObserver
    Enclosing class:
    JobService

    public abstract static class JobService.AbstractJobletObserver
extends android.content.BroadcastReceiver
implements ILetObserver

    AbstractJobletObserver provides a mechanism to monitor the state of the submitted job. The AbstractJobletObserver receives callbacks when there have been changes in progress, completion or failure of the operation.

    Since:
    API 1

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      AbstractJobletObserver(android.os.Handler handler)
      Constructor to create a new instance of AbstractJobletObserver

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      abstract void onCancel(java.lang.String rid)
      Called to notify the client when job is canceled completely.
      abstract void onComplete(java.lang.String rid, JobInfo jobInfo)
      Called to notify the client when a job is completed successfully for getting details
      abstract void onFail(java.lang.String rid, Result result)
      Called to notify the client with reason and detail when job is finished with error.
      abstract void onProgress(java.lang.String rid, JobInfo jobInfo)
      Called to notify the client when the state of a job in progressing for monitoring the change of job state
      void register(android.content.Context context)
      Requests to register the observer to monitor the events of the job status.
      void unregister(android.content.Context context)
      Requests to unregister the observer to stop monitoring and receiving the events of the job.

    • Constructor Detail

      • AbstractJobletObserver

        public AbstractJobletObserver(android.os.Handler handler)

        Constructor to create a new instance of AbstractJobletObserver

        Parameters:
        handler - The handler to run callbacks on, or null if none.
        Since:
        API 1

    • Method Detail

      • register

        public final void register(android.content.Context context)

        Requests to register the observer to monitor the events of the job status.

        Specified by:
        register in interface ILetObserver
        Parameters:
        context - The Context in which the application is running. If it's null, event will not be triggered.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - If context is null.
        Since:
        API 1

      • unregister

        public final void unregister(android.content.Context context)

        Requests to unregister the observer to stop monitoring and receiving the events of the job.

        Specified by:
        unregister in interface ILetObserver
        Parameters:
        context - The Context in which the application is running.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - If context is null.
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if this receiver hasn't been registered.
        Since:
        API 1

      • onComplete

        public abstract void onComplete(java.lang.String rid,
                                JobInfo jobInfo)

        Called to notify the client when a job is completed successfully for getting details

        Specified by:
        onComplete in interface ILetObserver
        Parameters:
        rid - Request Id received from PrinterService.submit(Context, PrintAttributes, PrintletAttributes) or ScannerService.submit(Context, com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.ScanAttributes, com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.ScanletAttributes) or CopierService.submit(Context, CopyAttributes, CopyletAttributes)
        jobInfo - JobInfo carrying of the job details
        Since:
        API 1

      • onProgress

        public abstract void onProgress(java.lang.String rid,
                                JobInfo jobInfo)

        Called to notify the client when the state of a job in progressing for monitoring the change of job state

        Specified by:
        onProgress in interface ILetObserver
        Parameters:
        rid - Request Id received from PrinterService.submit(Context, PrintAttributes, PrintletAttributes) or ScannerService.submit(Context, com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.ScanAttributes, com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.ScanletAttributes) or CopierService.submit(Context, CopyAttributes, CopyletAttributes)
        jobInfo - JobInfo carrying of the job details
        Since:
        API 1

      • onFail

        public abstract void onFail(java.lang.String rid,
                            Result result)

        Called to notify the client with reason and detail when job is finished with error.

        Specified by:
        onFail in interface ILetObserver
        Parameters:
        rid - Request Id received from PrinterService.submit(Context, PrintAttributes, PrintletAttributes) or ScannerService.submit(Context, com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.ScanAttributes, com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.ScanletAttributes) or CopierService.submit(Context, CopyAttributes, CopyletAttributes)
        result - Returns details of the failure.
        Since:
        API 1
        See Also:
        Result

      • onCancel

        public abstract void onCancel(java.lang.String rid)

        Called to notify the client when job is canceled completely.

        Specified by:
        onCancel in interface ILetObserver
        Parameters:
        rid - Request Id received from PrinterService.submit(Context, PrintAttributes, PrintletAttributes) or ScannerService.submit(Context, com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.ScanAttributes, com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.ScanletAttributes) or CopierService.submit(Context, CopyAttributes, CopyletAttributes)
        Since:
        API 1
